name: Zhejiang Southeast Space Frame Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Southeast Space Frame Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and installs steel structures worldwide. It provides long-span space truss structures and spaces; mesh net shell structures; multi-layer, high-rise, and super high-rise heavy steel structure; light steel structures; metal roof systems; and steel structure residential products. The company was formerly known as Zhejiang Southeast Space Frame Group Co., Ltd. Zhejiang Southeast Space Frame Co., Ltd. was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.
